text: Aaj Boss ne meeting mein meri capability par sawal uthaya aur sabke samne humiliated kiya, tabhi se mere sir mein itna bhari-pan aur dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain. Gaon mein Monsoon ki dhokhadhadi se Papa ki fasal barbaad ho gayi aur Sahukaar ka karz sar par hai, isliye shaayad mera sharir bilkul toot raha hai. Mujhe bas ye sir dard thik karna hai taaki main bacchon ke liye kaam par wapas ja sakun.

Team meeting mein zillat milne ke baad se meri chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan hai ki saans lena mushkil ho raha hai. Divorced hone ki wajah se samaj pehle hi tana deta hai, aur ab crop failure se chit fund ke paise doobne ka darr meri neend uda raha hai. Ye chest tightness thik nahi ho rahi aur lag raha hai ki mera dum ghut jayega, bas sharir mein jaan nahi bachi.

Boss ki screaming ke baad se mere pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai jo ja hi nahi rahi. Gaon mein kisan credit card ka loan baki hai aur fasal na hone se remittance band hone wali hai, isliye shaayad mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai. Is thakan aur sharir dard ka koi ilaj batao kyunki main ab aur kamzori bardasht nahi kar sakti, bacchon ko kaun sambhaalega?

Meeting mein sabke samne mazaak banne ke baad se mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb sa sunn-pan aur bhari-pan chha gaya hai. Savings wipe out ho chuki hain aur moneylender ka dabav har din badh raha hai, isi wajah se shaayad meri aankhon mein har waqt jalan aur neend ki kami rehti hai. Ye thakan itni hai ki bacchon ke school ka lunch box banane ki bhi himmat nahi bachi.

Aaj meeting mein bezatti milne ke baad se mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur gardan mein itni akdan hai ki hilna mushkil hai. Crop insurance na hone ki wajah se debt spiral badhta ja raha hai aur 'log kya kahenge' ka darr mere haazme ko bilkul bigad chuka hai. Is bhari-pan aur sharir ki thakan ne meri metro city mein survive karne ki kshamta hi khatam kar di hai.
